title: Mission to Ruul (Galactic Civil War)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Youmay|[[Brenn Tantor]]'s mission to [[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] [[Mission to Ruul (Clone Wars)|mission]] to [[Ruul (moon)|Ruul]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]}} {{Battle |prev=[[Escape from Kalaan]]''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' |conc= |next=[[Mission to Trasse]] |image=[[File:Ruul_battle2.jpg]] |name=Mission to Ruul |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |date=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]This battle occurs prior to [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], which begins at the start of the [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] year. |place=[[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]] |result=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] victory; [[Beri Tulon]] freed and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] codes stolen |side1=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side2=Alliance to Restore the Republic |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2=*[[General/Legends|General]] [[Tyr Taskeen]] *General [[Brenn Tantor]] *[[Beri Tulon]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PT walkers]] *[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST walkers]] *[[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bikes]] |forces2=*[[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel troopers]] *[[Ruulian Rebels]] *[[Hover Transport TC9]]s *2 [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PT walkers]] *2 [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST walkers]] *[[Tracked Mobile Base|TR-MB]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Moderate to heavy |casual2=Light to moderate |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|I'm going to steal an AT-AT.''"
"''What? Are you out of your mind?''"
"''Quite possibly. You gonna help me?''"
"''Sure. I've got nothing better to do.|[[Brenn Tantor]] and [[Beri Tulon]]|}} The '''Mission to Ruul''' was [[Brenn Tantor]]'s first mission after defecting to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Having defected, Tantor offered to provide the Alliance with an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] as a sign that he was not a traitor. To do so, however, required the cooperation of [[Beri Tulon]], Tantor's old mentor, who had been assigned to an AT-AT [[Trasse Proving Grounds|factory]] for years. The complication was that Tulon had been captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during an attempt to defect—by Tantor, in fact—and was sent to [[Tarkin Detention Facility]] on [[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]]. Under the close supervision of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Tyr Taskeen]], Tantor took a light force to Ruul, where he set up to ambush the convoy escorting Tulon to the prison. Before Tulon got there, however, a lighter force passed, escorting a captured leader of the [[Ruulian Rebels]]. Tantor swiftly eliminated the guards and returned the leader to his people nearby. [[File:Tulon_to_prison.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Beri Tulon]] is escorted to [[Tarkin Detention Facility]].]] Tulon's escort passed by not long after. Tantor's troopers descended from the hills, bringing down the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] that guarded him. Tulon was quickly bundled into a transport and the party rushed to the designated evacuation zone, running into Imperial patrols and turrets along the way. Once safe, Tantor questioned Tulon as to the location of the factory. Tulon revealed that it was on the asteroid [[Trasse/Legends|Trasse]], but could not be approached without the proper codes. Fortunately, the nearby Imperial [[Sounder Flats computer complex|computer bank]] at [[Sounder Flats]] would hold such codes. Still using only infantry and transports, supplemented by the Ruulian Rebels and four of their captured walkers, Tantor subdued the Imperial bases guarding the complex and made a successful information raid, despite several strong Imperial counterattacks. Once Beri Tulon had sliced the codes from the facility, Tantor and his forces faded away as quickly as they had struck. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW_3_ABY_2}} {{Interlang |de=Mission von Ruul (3 NSY) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ruul (Galactic Civil War), mission to}} [[Category:Battles of Ruul]] [[Category:Missions of the Galactic Civil War]] [[Category:Rescue missions]]
